title: Compounds and mixtures with antidegradant and antifatigue efficacy and compositions including said compounds
abstract: A compound represented bz the formula: (I) wherein each R is independently selected from the group consisting of (i) substituted or unsubstituted alkyl with C = 0 to 12 inclusive; wherein X1, X2, X3 and X4 are each independently selected from the group consisting of alkyl, aryl, alkylaryl groups and hydrogen; wherein R1, R2, R3, and R4 are each independently selected from the group consisting of alkyl, aryl, alkylaryl groups and hydrogen; and wherein one of R1 and R2 and one of R3 and R4 may optionally be bridged by a polymethylene group to form a cycloalkyl; wherein when C=0 in R, the combined group R1 R2 is the same as the combined group R3 R4; and wherein when C=1 in R, each of R1, R2, R3, and R4 are hydrogen.
claims: Claims 1 . A compound represented by the formula: wherein each R is independently selected from the group consisting of a substituted or unsubstituted alkyl with C = 0 to 3 inclusive; wherein X 1 , X 2 , X 3 and X 4 are each independently selected from the group consisting of hydrogen or methyl; wherein R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , and R 4 are each independently selected from the group consisting of propyl, ethyl, methyl, or hydrogen, and wherein one of R 1 and R 2 and one of R 3 and R 4 may optionally be bridged by a polymethylene group to form a cycloalkyl; wherein when C=0 in R, the combined group R 1 R 2 is the same as the combined group R 3 R 4 ; and wherein when C=1 in R, each of R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , and R 4 are hydrogen. 2. The compound of claim 1 , wherein R is selected from the group consisting of a substituted or unsubstituted alkyl with C = 0 to 2. 3. The compound of claim 1 , wherein R is selected from the group consisting of a substituted or unsubstituted alkyl with C = 1 to 2. 4. The compound of claim 1 , wherein R is selected from the group consisting of a substituted or unsubstituted alkyl with C = 1 to 3. 5. The compound of claim 1 , wherein one of R 1 and R 2 and one of R 3 and R 4 are bridged by a polymethylene group to form a cyclohexane group. 6. The compound of claim 1 , wherein one of R 1 and R 2 and one of R 3 and R 4 are bridged by a polymethylene group to form a cyclobutane group. 7. The compound of claim 1 , wherein one of R 1 and R 2 and one of R 3 and R 4 are bridged by a polymethylene group to form a cyclopentane group. 8. An antidegradant composition comprising the compound of claim 1 and optionally a carrier for said compound. 9. A lubricant composition comprising a lubricant and the compound of claim 1 . 10. A vulcanizable elastomeric formulation comprising an elastomer and the compound of claim 1 . 1 1 . The formulation of claim 10 wherein said the compound is present in an amount of from 0.1 to 20.0 parts per 100 parts elastomer. 12. The formulation of claim 1 1 wherein said the compound is present in an amount of from 0.1 to 5.0 parts per 100 parts elastomer. 13. A vulcanized elastomeric article with at least one component formed from the vulcanizable elastomeric formulation of claim 10. 14. The vulcanized elastomeric article of claim 13 wherein said vulcanized elastomeric article is a vehicle tire. 15. The vehicle tire of claim 14 wherein said component is a sidewalk 16. A combustible fuel composition comprising a combustible fuel and the compound of claim 1 . 17. A fuel additive composition comprising a fuel additive and the compound of claim 1 .
